title: Audio
description: PsychoPy Audio component for audio playback

id.description: Unique identifier for the audio component

filePath.description: Path to the audio file (recommended format: .wav)

loops.description: Number of loops (0 for once, -1 for infinite)

hamming.description: Whether to apply Hanning window (smooth onset/offset)

audioDevice.description: Name of the audio device to use

duration.description: Duration of the audio in seconds

isPlaying.description: Whether the audio is currently playing

isFinished.description: Whether the audio has finished playing
